hook: On most therapy platforms, the clients aren't yours. They're the platform's.
vo: On most therapy platforms, the clients aren't yours. They're the platform's.
You build the relationship. They hold the contact details.
Leave the platform, lose the clients.
On Faresay, your clients are yours. You set your prices. You control your data. You can leave whenever you want — and take them with you.
cta: Your clients are yours. That's how it should be.
broll_notes: Close-up of a phone screen showing a simple client list, then a hand unplugging a cable — suggesting clean separation, no dependency. Neutral tones, no faces.
